results.text: Jack Hextall – 2026 NHL Draft Prospect Profile - The Hockey Writers. Jack Hextall is a highly competitive center out of Rolling Meadows, Illinois. He put up 58 points in 59 regular-season games with the Youngstown Phantoms of the United States Hockey League... Jack Hextall - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. A versatile player, Hextall presents himself as an option below the goal line, at the half-wall, and high in the zone. Teammates can bounce passes off of him, and when the play breaks down, Hextall has enough of a shot to finish on his own.
